sp: 3.1.1 Describe the types of teeth and their functions.
3.1.2 Label the structure of the tooth.
3.1.3 Compare and contrast sets of milk teeth and permanent teeth.
3.1.4 Relate dental care with the structure of the tooth.
3.2.1 Give examples of food for each class of food.
3.2.2 Make generalisation about the importance of food according to its class for the human body.
3.2.3 Explain with examples of balanced diet based on the food pyramid.
3.2.4 Give reasons on the effects of imbalanced food intake.
3.3.1 Describe the digestion process.
3.3.2 Arrange in sequence the flow of food during digestion.
3.3.3 Conclude the digested food that is not required by the body.
objektif: Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat Describe the types of teeth and their functions. dengan betul.
Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat Describe the types of teeth and their functions. dengan bimbingan guru.

sp: 4.1.1 Classify animals according to their eating habits.
4.1.2 Explain with examples the eating habits of herbivore, carnivore and omnivore.
4.1.3 Make inference about the animal groupings based on their eating habits.
4.1.4 Compare and constrast the dentition of herbivore, carnivore and omnivore.
